creator: ibex@physik.TU-Berlin.DE
text:
I put an updated version of the mysql-port in

	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/mysql-3.21.30.tar.gz

Changes in detail:

	- upgrade to version 3.21.30
	- delete patches/patch-ad (was included in the standard distribution)
	- added a few items to pkg/PLIST

Have Fun... 8-)
